variables.name: productive_liquid_volume
variables.label: Productive liquid volume
variables.description: Caller-asserted biologically productive liquid volume.

variables.name: operating_biomass_concentration
variables.label: Operating biomass concentration
variables.description: Dry biomass concentration in the productive liquid.

variables.name: volumetric_productivity
variables.label: Volumetric productivity
variables.description: Imposed M0 biomass productivity; not a kinetic prediction.

variables.name: maximum_specific_growth_rate
variables.label: Maximum specific growth rate
variables.description: Screening reference used only for the dilution-to-growth ratio.

variables.name: operating_days_per_year
variables.label: Operating days per year
variables.description: Annualization basis for biomass, energy, and partial economics.

variables.name: feed_events_per_day
variables.label: Feed and harvest events per day
variables.description: Event frequency used only to convert daily quantities to per-event quantities.

variables.name: biomass_nitrogen_fraction
variables.label: Biomass nitrogen fraction
variables.description: Nitrogen incorporated per dry biomass mass.

variables.name: biomass_phosphorus_fraction
variables.label: Biomass phosphorus fraction
variables.description: Phosphorus incorporated per dry biomass mass.

variables.name: biomass_carbon_fraction
variables.label: Biomass carbon fraction
variables.description: Carbon incorporated per dry biomass mass.

variables.name: nitrogen_stock_concentration
variables.label: Nitrogen stock concentration
variables.description: Elemental nitrogen concentration in the dosing stock.

variables.name: phosphorus_stock_concentration
variables.label: Phosphorus stock concentration
variables.description: Elemental phosphorus concentration in the dosing stock.

variables.name: carbon_stock_concentration
variables.label: Carbon stock concentration
variables.description: Elemental carbon concentration in the dosing stock.

variables.name: co2_specific_gas_rate
variables.label: CO2 specific gas-rate benchmark
variables.description: Instantaneous pH-control gas-rate benchmark, not consumed CO2.

variables.name: harvest_recovery
variables.label: Single-pass biomass capture recovery
variables.description: Captured biomass fraction from the processed side stream with filtrate return.

variables.name: concentrate_biomass_concentration
variables.label: Concentrate biomass concentration
variables.description: Dry biomass concentration in recovered concentrate; must exceed culture concentration.

variables.name: filtration_flux
variables.label: Filtration flux
variables.description: Screening permeate or processed-volume flux used for area sizing.

variables.name: filtration_operating_hours_per_day
variables.label: Filtration operating hours per day
variables.description: Explicit daily filtration time basis.

variables.name: pump_electric_power
variables.label: Pump electric power
variables.description: Bound pump electrical power, typically from the reviewed 047 model.

variables.name: circulation_operating_hours_per_day
variables.label: Circulation operating hours per day
variables.description: Explicit daily pump operating-time basis.

variables.name: electricity_price
variables.label: Electricity price
variables.description: Electricity price for the pump-electricity-only economic boundary.

variables.name: product_price
variables.label: Recovered biomass product price
variables.description: Optional sale price used only for the gross-margin proxy.
